description: Integration boundaries across API routes/services and platform interactions.

commands.name: api-integration-suite
commands.run: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src python3.11 -m pytest -o "addopts=" -v src/api/tests/test_executor_tracing_integration.py src/api/tests/test_sandbox_integration.py src/api/tests/test_integration_e2e.py
